github_app_detail: Missing required GitHub App credential(s): GITHUB_APP_ID, GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY or GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH, GITHUB_INSTALLATION_ID.
github_oauth_detail: Missing or invalid GitHub OAuth setting(s): GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET, SESSION_SECRET_KEY.
model_provider_detail: Configure a live model provider before running provider smoke verification.
next_step: Save missing runtime secrets through the dashboard or make configure-runtime-secrets, then rerun make credential-smoke.
